name: Skillet Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until the meat is browned.
2. Drain off any excess fat from the skillet.
3. Stir in the tomatoes (with their liquid) and remaining ingredients, stirring to break up the tomatoes.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer, covered, stirring occasionally.
5. Cook until the noodles are tender, about 20 minutes. Add water if necessary for consistency.
6. Serve hot.
